name: Agent-First Slug
synopsis: Rust slug generation with explicit caller configuration for path and URL path segments.
intent: Provide a reusable slug primitive where callers configure character classes, dots, transliteration, truncation, empty behavior, and validation instead of relying on hard-coded product rules
Keep the library generic: no CLI, presets, downstream project names, hidden fallback words, or built-in legacy modes
Make slug generation deterministic and test-covered so callers can preserve or migrate their own identifiers intentionally
mutations: Initial release: configurable slug generation for local path and URL path segments.
